nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. Low around 68, with temperatures rising to around 70 overnight. Southeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am. Mostly cloudy. High near 88, with temperatures falling to around 86 in the afternoon. South southeast wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
